title: Mojtaba Khamenei awaiting prosthetic leg after strike, suffered severe facial burns
summary_full: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei faces significant medical challenges post-bomb attack, impacting his direct engagement. This has amplified the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps' influence, with analysts suggesting a shift towards a 'board-style' leadership where military commanders hold sway.  The situation casts uncertainty over ongoing ceasefire talks and diplomatic pathways.
